infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Spanish4Hoteleros records your voice so you can practice speaking Spanish and receive feedback.
infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: Spanish4Hoteleros transcribes your spoken Spanish to evaluate your practice answers.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Spanish4Hoteleros can access your photo library if you choose to add a profile picture.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Spanish4Hoteleros can use the camera if you choose to take a profile picture.

plugins.microphonePermission: Spanish4Hoteleros records your voice so you can practice speaking Spanish and receive feedback.
plugins.speechRecognitionPermission: Spanish4Hoteleros transcribes your spoken Spanish to evaluate your practice answers.
